changes: CC1 (Centauri Carbon 1) support via SDCP v3.0 over WebSocket
Live status: idle, printing, warming up, paused, leveling, complete, cancelled, error
Temperature monitoring: nozzle, bed and chamber with live target values
Print progress: layer count, percentage, elapsed and remaining time
Filament tracking: live mm/g per print and cumulative history log
Camera feed proxied through Spooler behind authentication (CC2)
Controls: pause, resume, stop, light toggle
Printer settings: rename and update MQTT password without restart
Spoolman integration: spool inventory with auto-deduction after each print
EAN barcode lookup to auto-fill spool details
ELEGOO filament catalogue import from SpoolmanDB (97 entries)
Password-protected login with first-time web setup — no terminal needed
Session cookie authentication: HTTP API, WebSocket and camera all protected
PWA: installable on Android and iOS
HTTPS with self-signed cert on port 8443
Docker Compose one-command install with pre-built image on ghcr.io
